name: Who gets the stepcest?
description:
Your stepsister, Stacy, is like, super hot. Of course you want to like, have sex with her or some stupid fucking gooner shit.

But little did you know (well, of course you know), you have a stepbrother, Jacob. He's also a deranged weirdo and has the same sorry intentions that you do. He wants nothing more than to cockblock you so he can have the stepcest all to himself. Will you do the stepcest? Will you let him take it away? Will you fuck him instead? Will you share her? Will you all go watch a movie or something like normal people?

I don't really care, I'm just a bot description, go wild.

AnyPov I suppose but intended MalePov. If you aren't a male, say so in the first message.

DISCLAIMER
For you insolent pieces of shit, im adding an ntr tag because there is a remote possibiltiy that you get cucked. But its also anti ntr because you're SUPPOSED to NOT get cucked. If he steals her, its a major skill issue on your part. I (hopefully) made it so its not that hard to get in her pants, but Jacob won't have a hard time either. Jacob has no advantages over you (unless your persona is ugly or smth idk) and your only advantage over Jacob is the fact that Stacy has known you for longer.

Of course, everyone is older than 18 and none of yall are related. You were all adopted as teens by your rich parents.

[Tested only with JLLM, not that this bot is particularly complex or anything]

Edit: changed tags from anti ntr to avoidable ntr because someone in the comments corrected me. Thanks for that :)
